title: Improve shregmap to handle case where first flop is common to two chains

features.name: multiple shift register chains sharing common input element
features.description: Code should include two shift register chains that share a common input element (head), where each chain shifts left and appends the shared element to its low bits

features.name: shift left via concatenation pattern
features.description: Code should include shift register operation using concatenation with slice and new bit: {signal[high-1:0], new_bit}

features.name: shared register driving multiple shift chains
features.description: Code should include a single register that is used as input to multiple shift register chains in the same clocked always block
